documentGroups.title: Declaration of Covenants, Conditions & Restrictions (CC&Rs)
documentGroups.description: The CC&Rs are the primary governing document for Lago Bello Subdivision. This collection includes the original declaration, amendments, bylaws, and all referenced exhibits.

documents.title: Declaration of CC&Rs
documents.description: The original Declaration of Covenants, Conditions & Restrictions for Lago Bello Subdivision.

documents.title: Declaration of CC&Rs (Recorded Copy with Exhibits)
documents.description: The officially recorded copy filed with Cameron County, Texas (Instrument No. 2017-00038179).

documents.title: 1st Amendment — Section 2 Annexation
documents.description: First Amendment annexing 18 new residential lots in Section 2 into the subdivision.

documents.title: Exhibit A — Subdivision Plat
documents.description: The official plat map showing lot boundaries and layout.

documents.title: Exhibit B — Additional Property Map
documents.description: Map of additional property that may be annexed into the subdivision.

documents.title: Exhibit C — Bylaws
documents.description: The Bylaws of Lago Bello Home Owners Association, Inc. covering board governance, voting, and officer duties.

documents.title: Exhibit D — Open Records Policy
documents.description: The Association's policy on access to HOA records, as required by the Texas Residential Property Owners Protection Act.

documentGroups.title: Section 1 Plat and Final Engineering Report (Recorded)
documentGroups.description: The recorded subdivision plat and final engineering report for Section 1 of Lago Bello, filed with Cameron County.

documents.title: Signature Page — Cab 1 Pg 3622
documents.description: The signature page for the recorded Section 1 plat.

documents.title: Final Plat — Cab 1 Pg 3623
documents.description: The final plat for Section 1 of Lago Bello Subdivision.

documents.title: Engineering Report — Cab 1 Pg 3624
documents.description: The final engineering report for Section 1 of Lago Bello Subdivision.

documentGroups.description: The recorded subdivision plat and final engineering report for Section 2 of Lago Bello, filed with Cameron County.
